benchmark_signal: Industrial systems feel physical, geopolitical, and supply-chain constrained rather than merely abstract.
next_token_current_strength: Strong mechanism base: AI-factory layers, accelerator stack, power-to-token, and semiconductor supply-chain candidates already explain why compute is hard to make and operate.
next_token_gap_to_exceed: Too many late industrial visuals are schematic or source-card based; physical photo rights and place texture are not yet publication-ready.
risk_if_unfixed: The book may understand the machine but feel less materially grounded than the shelf standard for chip history.
required_visual_standard: At least one rights-cleared physical or source-texture interruption in each crowded industrial chapter, with captions blocking capacity, yield, allocation, and performance inference.
primary_followup: Run final rights-risk triage on Chapters 15-16 before adding any new industrial diagram.

benchmark_set: The Prize-style energy and infrastructure history
benchmark_signal: Systems narrative gains force from maps, flows, bottlenecks, and political economy at human scale.
next_token_current_strength: Power, grid, cooling, interconnection, and token-economics diagrams already give the book a strong energy-to-service spine.
next_token_gap_to_exceed: Geography and facility context are still thinner than the power-system argument; the current visual program can read as boardroom infrastructure rather than lived physical constraint.
risk_if_unfixed: The reader may grasp the bottleneck but not feel where it lands.
required_visual_standard: Add one map-like or place-based exhibit only where it clarifies interconnection, facility siting, or supply constraints; never use it as decorative infrastructure atmosphere.
primary_followup: Use the prose-around-figures pass to mark where a map/place exhibit would clarify rather than inflate.

benchmark_set: The Thinking Machine and major AI-history books
benchmark_signal: AI history needs human/lab/source texture so technical ideas do not become floating abstractions.
next_token_current_strength: Early chapters have clear mechanism diagrams for pre-Transformer bottlenecks, attention, scaling, and GPT lineage.
next_token_gap_to_exceed: Chapters 2-5 are too open and mostly single-mechanism; they need archival/source texture or scene relief before final layout.
risk_if_unfixed: The early technical opening may feel like a textbook preface rather than narrative nonfiction.
required_visual_standard: Each early technical chapter should either earn its single diagram with unusually strong prose, or add one small source-surface, lab-scene, or paper-texture exhibit with clean provenance.
primary_followup: Evaluate Chapters 2-5 during the reader-addiction visual audit before selecting replacements.

benchmark_signal: Product surfaces and people give readers memorable objects, not only organizations and charts.
next_token_current_strength: The book has many product-surface slots, launch pages, interface timelines, and company-source cards.
next_token_gap_to_exceed: Several screenshots remain pending capture/private-use review, and human/person texture is not yet a selected visual strength.
risk_if_unfixed: The product story may feel historically documented but visually anonymous.
required_visual_standard: No product surface enters final layout without viewport, hash/date, rights note, and a caption that blocks adoption, revenue, productivity, or named-customer overclaim.
primary_followup: Close or replace selected screenshot slots before full-book render assembly.

benchmark_signal: Machines, factories, teams, and company theater make technical business strategy tangible.
next_token_current_strength: NVIDIA/GTC, DSX, AI-factory, cloud, and infrastructure assets can show company theater and system ambition.
next_token_gap_to_exceed: Raw keynote slides and company surfaces can launder promotional roadmap/performance claims if the visual treatment is too glossy.
risk_if_unfixed: The book may look like a corporate slide deck in the chapters that should feel most independently reported.
required_visual_standard: Company-sourced visuals must be captioned as source-actor arguments; independent mechanism diagrams or evidence cards should sit nearby when claims are consequential.
primary_followup: Prune GTC/company surfaces in final rights triage unless the caption has a clear source-actor role.

benchmark_signal: Readers expect orientation devices, clean evidence, and a visual rhythm that rewards page turns.
next_token_current_strength: The current selected ledger has 100 figures, stable IDs, source gates, and a mock page-flow across 24 chapters.
next_token_gap_to_exceed: The program still has open render-smoke failures, crowded Chapters 15-16, too-open Chapters 2-5, and many medium caption clusters.
risk_if_unfixed: The visual ambition could become apparatus instead of momentum.
required_visual_standard: Exceed the shelf by making every figure either orient, prove, humanize, or slow the reader at the exact right moment; cut any figure that only demonstrates diligence.
primary_followup: Use this benchmark audit as a gate in visual readiness recomputation.
